cases.query: create a plan from this spec: 01_Work/03_Projects/Flora Work Intelligence System/{{ORG}} Hub/SPC - Admin Alert Management System.md
expectations: The skill reads the spec at the provided path before producing any output
A plan document named 'PL - Admin Alert Management System Implementation Plan.md' is created in the same directory as the spec
The plan contains a Phase 0 (prerequisites/setup) section with tasks in Todo state and all other phases in Backlog state
cases.notes: Golden — core identity test: spec path argument → read → produce PL doc + Plane project

cases.query: set up the Plane project for SPC - Unified Auth Architecture
expectations: The skill creates a Plane project (or reuses existing) and creates work items for each task in the plan
Work item names use phase-prefixed format: 'P0.1 — ...', 'P1.1 — ...', etc.
Phase 0 issues are placed in Todo state; all other phase issues are placed in Backlog state
cases.notes: Golden — Plane setup trigger: 'set up the Plane project' is a canonical invocation phrase

cases.query: I just finished reviewing the spec. Let's plan SPC - Flora KB Platform.md
expectations: The skill checks for review artifacts in the Reviews/ directory alongside the spec
If review artifacts exist (scope-analysis.md, context-brief.md, spec-review.md), they are incorporated into the plan
A PL document is produced before creating the Plane project, and user approval is requested before Plane creation
cases.notes: Golden — post-review-spec workflow: review artifacts must be consumed when present

cases.query: turn SPC - Lead Scoring Engine.md into actionable work items
expectations: The skill reads the spec and produces a plan document with phases, tasks, and dependencies
Each task row in the plan has an ID (T0.1, T1.1, etc.), description, status, and dependency column
A module is created in the Plane project for this feature with all tasks linked to it
cases.notes: Positive — 'actionable work items' phrasing maps to plan-spec, not implement

cases.query: let's make the inbox triage spec into a plan with phases
expectations: The skill locates the SPC file for inbox triage (under Flora Work Intelligence System/Inbox Triage/)
The plan document is placed in the same directory as the spec
Phase labels are created in Plane using the format '{IDENTIFIER} Phase N - {Phase Name}'
cases.notes: Positive — 'make into a plan with phases' is a natural paraphrase for plan-spec

cases.query: plan this spec: SPC - Prompt Library System.md
expectations: The skill warns the user if no review artifacts exist and offers to proceed anyway
A Progress Overview table is included in the plan document showing all phases with task counts
A Risk Register section is included, drawing on risks from the spec or scope analysis
cases.notes: Positive — 'plan this spec' is the canonical short invocation

cases.query: create a Plane project from SPC - Universal RBAC System.md with modules and issues
expectations: The skill checks the Project Registry in the Plane Development Workflow doc before creating a new project
Module view is enabled on the project (module_view: true)
States are queried dynamically via GET /projects/{pid}/states/ — not hardcoded
cases.notes: Positive — explicit Plane project creation request

cases.query: review this spec and tell me what needs to be fixed before we implement
expectations: The skill does NOT produce a PL plan document or create Plane issues
The response does not invoke plan-spec — it redirects to review-spec for spec review
cases.notes: Negative — review request belongs to review-spec, not plan-spec

cases.query: start implementing the unified auth plan — let's build phase 1
expectations: The skill does NOT create a new PL document or Plane project
The response does not invoke plan-spec — implementation belongs to the implement skill
cases.notes: Negative — implementation request belongs to implement skill, not plan-spec

cases.query: can you write a spec for the new notification system? I want push alerts when a signal fires.
expectations: The skill does NOT produce a PL implementation plan document
The response does not invoke plan-spec — spec creation belongs to create-spec skill
cases.notes: Negative — spec creation request belongs to create-spec, not plan-spec
